hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files — they may contain secrets. Use .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) pnpm biome check --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; *.rs) (cd src-tauri && cargo fmt -- "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH") 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac
